Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a major city in Nigeria, known for its economic growth and infrastructure development. It is one of the fastest-growing cities in the country, with a rapidly expanding population and a diverse economy. The city is home to several key industries, including manufacturing, agriculture, and services. It is also a hub for education and research, with several prestigious universities and research institutions located in the area. The city's strategic location along the coast makes it an important trade and transportation hub.
